flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Cisco College fell 46% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0k → 1.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cisco College rose 43% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.0k → $7.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Cisco College fell 42% between 2006 and 2009 (14.6% → 8.5%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Cisco College rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.8k → $4.7k).
